description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-story hostel building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The facade features rows of evenly spaced windows and several small balconies, primarily on the front side, with a muted beige exterior accented by darker window frames and balcony railings. The main entrance is located at one end of the building, marked by a small overhang and a landscaped area with greenery. The structure is bordered by a wide, dark pavement or driveway, suggesting vehicular access and urban placement. The building's overall appearance is functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on symmetry and practicality. The use of concrete and glass is evident, with some metal elements likely present in railings and window frames.
description: A modern, rectangular multi-story hostel with a flat roof, rows of windows, and small balconies on a beige facade, featuring a main entrance with landscaping and a wide driveway.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the hostel with two rows of windows and balconies, highlighting the building's length and the flat roof.
description_view_1: This end view reveals the main entrance area with landscaping and a driveway, as well as the building's depth and side windows.
description_view_2: The front facade is visible here, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of windows and balconies, along with the wide driveway in front.
description_view_3: This side view shows the building's depth, the continuation of the driveway, and the absence of balconies on this facade.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at one end of the building, featuring a rectangular doorway beneath a small overhang or canopy. The entrance is adjacent to a landscaped area with greenery and is accessible from the wide driveway. The door appears to be standard-sized, with no visible steps or ramps, and the design is simple and functional.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows across the main facades, with each floor featuring evenly spaced, rectangular windows. The windows are medium-sized, with simple frames and no visible shutters or decorative elements. The arrangement emphasizes regularity and practicality.
attribute_balcony_presence: Balconies are present on the main facade, with several small, rectangular balconies distributed evenly across the upper floors. Each balcony has a simple metal railing and is integrated into the building's design without ornate features.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary utilitarian style with modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on function over decoration.
